投资.description: 市场、宏观、利率、公司与资产价格

items.title: US Supreme Court lets abortion pill mail delivery continue
items.analysis_zh: 美国最高法院决定允许继续邮寄堕胎药，这一裁决引发了广泛关注。这一决定不仅影响了女性获取医疗服务的方式，也可能在未来影响各州对堕胎权的立法。此举被视为对女性生育权的重要保护，可能会激励更多人参与相关的社会运动。
items.analysis_en: The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled to allow the continued mail delivery of abortion pills, a decision that has garnered significant attention. This ruling not only affects how women access medical services but may also influence state legislation regarding abortion rights in the future. It is viewed as an important safeguard for women's reproductive rights and could encourage greater public engagement in related social movements.

items.title: Figma has a fix for its ailing stock — a new way to make money off its AI products
items.analysis_zh: Figma的股票在最新财报超出预期后大幅上涨，并且公司提高了全年业绩展望。这一变化表明Figma在AI产品方面找到了新的盈利模式，可能会吸引更多投资者的关注。随着公司业绩的改善，Figma有望在竞争激烈的市场中占据更有利的位置，进一步推动其股价上涨。
items.analysis_en: Figma's stock surged after its latest earnings report exceeded expectations, and the company raised its full-year outlook. This change indicates that Figma has discovered a new way to monetize its AI products, which may attract more investor interest. With the improvement in its performance, Figma is likely to secure a stronger position in a competitive market, potentially driving its stock price even higher.

items.title: Dems demand Lutnick resign over Epstein interview: 'You lied'
items.analysis_zh: 美国民主党人要求Lutnick辞职，原因是他在接受采访时对与已故金融家爱泼斯坦的关系撒谎。这一事件引发了广泛关注，因为爱泼斯坦的丑闻涉及许多高层人士，影响着公众对政治人物的信任。Lutnick的辞职可能会对白宫的形象造成进一步冲击，尤其是在特朗普总统仍然支持他的情况下，这可能加剧政治分歧。
items.analysis_en: Democrats are calling for Lutnick's resignation after he allegedly lied about his connections to the late financier Epstein during an interview. This incident has garnered significant attention, as Epstein's scandal involves many high-profile individuals, affecting public trust in political figures. Lutnick's resignation could further impact the White House's image, especially since President Trump continues to support him, potentially deepening political divides.

items.title: Gemini surges after Winklevoss Capital Fund invests $100 million in the crypto exchange
items.analysis_zh: Gemini加密货币交易所近日获得了Winklevoss Capital Fund的1亿美元投资，导致其股价大幅上涨。这一投资不仅表明了对Gemini未来发展的信心，也反映出市场对加密货币行业的持续关注。Gemini在本季度的收入超出预期，且亏损幅度低于分析师的预期，这可能会进一步提升投资者的信心，并吸引更多资金流入该平台。
items.analysis_en: Gemini, the cryptocurrency exchange, recently saw a significant surge in its stock price after receiving a $100 million investment from Winklevoss Capital Fund. This investment not only demonstrates confidence in Gemini's future prospects but also highlights the ongoing interest in the cryptocurrency sector. Additionally, Gemini exceeded revenue expectations for the quarter and reported a narrower loss than analysts had anticipated, which may further bolster investor confidence and attract more capital to the platform.

items.title: FEMSA’s NetPay brings digital payments to Mexico gas stations as Sheinbaum pushes shift from cash
items.analysis_zh: FEMSA的NetPay在墨西哥的加油站推出了数字支付服务，这一举措正值谢因鲍姆推动现金支付向数字支付转型的背景下。这项新服务的推出将为消费者提供更便捷的支付方式，同时也有助于提升加油站的运营效率。随着数字支付的普及，可能会进一步推动墨西哥整体经济的数字化进程，影响到其他行业的支付方式。
items.analysis_en: FEMSA's NetPay has introduced digital payment services at gas stations in Mexico, coinciding with Sheinbaum's push for a shift from cash to digital payments. This new service will provide consumers with a more convenient payment option while also enhancing the operational efficiency of gas stations. As digital payments become more widespread, it may further accelerate the overall digitization of the Mexican economy, impacting payment methods in other sectors as well.

items.title: Supreme Court allows mail-order of abortion pill mifepristone pending appeal
items.analysis_zh: 美国最高法院允许在上诉期间通过邮件订购堕胎药物米非司酮。这一决定是针对制药公司Danco Laboratories和GenBioPro提出的请求，旨在解除上诉法院对该药物邮寄分发的禁令。这一裁决的重要性在于，它可能会影响女性获取堕胎药物的途径，尤其是在一些州对堕胎权的限制日益严格的背景下。此举可能会引发更广泛的法律和社会讨论，涉及女性健康和生育权的问题。
items.analysis_en: The U.S. Supreme Court has allowed the mail-order distribution of the abortion pill mifepristone while an appeal is pending. This decision responds to requests from drugmakers Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro to lift a ban imposed by an appeals court on the mailing of the drug. The significance of this ruling lies in its potential impact on women's access to abortion medication, especially in the context of increasing restrictions on abortion rights in various states. This move may spark broader legal and social discussions surrounding women's health and reproductive rights.

items.title: SpaceX IPO prospectus could land as soon as next week, sources say
items.analysis_zh: SpaceX即将发布首次公开募股（IPO）招股说明书，预计将在下周公布。这一消息引起了广泛关注，因为SpaceX的上市可能会创造股票市场的新纪录。此次IPO不仅将为公司带来巨额资金，还可能推动航天行业的进一步发展，吸引更多投资者的目光。
items.analysis_en: SpaceX is set to release its initial public offering (IPO) prospectus, likely as soon as next week. This news has garnered significant attention, as the company's debut could set a new record in the stock market. The IPO is expected to raise substantial funds for SpaceX and may further stimulate growth in the aerospace industry, attracting more investors.

items.title: My wife and I retired with 22 times our income. Why don’t more people do what we did?
items.analysis_zh: 一对夫妇分享了他们成功退休的经验，表示他们的退休储蓄达到了其收入的22倍。他们认为，许多人对金钱的力量感到畏惧，甚至将其视为一种神秘的存在。这一现象值得关注，因为它反映了人们在财务管理方面的普遍心理障碍。如果更多人能够克服这种恐惧，学习有效的投资和储蓄策略，或许能实现更好的财务状况和退休生活。
items.analysis_en: A couple shared their successful retirement experience, stating that their savings reached 22 times their income. They believe that many people are intimidated by the power of money, viewing it almost as something magical. This phenomenon is significant as it highlights the common psychological barriers people face in financial management. If more individuals can overcome this fear and learn effective investment and saving strategies, they may achieve better financial health and retirement outcomes.

items.title: The bond market is already hiking rates as Kevin Warsh takes over as Fed’s new chair
items.analysis_zh: 随着凯文·沃什接任美联储新主席，债券市场已经开始提高利率。这一变化引发了市场的广泛关注，因为新任主席通常会面临市场动荡的考验。这不仅影响了投资者的信心，也可能对未来的货币政策产生深远影响。市场对沃什的领导能力充满期待，投资者将密切关注他如何应对当前经济挑战。
items.analysis_en: As Kevin Warsh takes over as the new chair of the Federal Reserve, the bond market has already begun to raise interest rates. This shift has garnered significant attention, as new Fed chairs are often tested by market turmoil. It affects investor confidence and could have profound implications for future monetary policy. The market is hopeful about Warsh's leadership, and investors will closely monitor how he addresses the current economic challenges.

items.title: Trump and Xi set for second day of talks after Taiwan warning
items.analysis_zh: 特朗普与习近平在台湾警告后进入第二天的会谈。这次会谈的重要性在于两国领导人将讨论影响全球经济和地缘政治的关键议题。双方的互动可能会影响未来的贸易关系和国际合作，尤其是在科技和安全领域。随着紧张局势的加剧，如何处理两国关系将对全球市场产生深远影响。
items.analysis_en: Trump and Xi are entering the second day of talks following a warning regarding Taiwan. The significance of these discussions lies in the fact that the two leaders will address key issues that impact the global economy and geopolitical landscape. Their interactions could influence future trade relations and international cooperation, particularly in technology and security. As tensions rise, how they manage their relationship will have far-reaching effects on global markets.

健康.description: 医学、营养、抗衰老、代谢与公共健康

items.title: Supreme Court Allows Abortion Pill Access by Mail to Continue
items.analysis_zh: 美国最高法院决定允许继续通过邮寄方式获取堕胎药物米非司酮。这一裁决对女性的生育权利具有重要意义，因为它确保了她们可以在家中安全地获得这一药物。此决定可能会影响未来关于堕胎药物的法律争议，并为其他州的相关政策提供参考。
items.analysis_en: The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled to allow continued access to the abortion pill mifepristone by mail. This decision is significant for women's reproductive rights as it ensures they can safely obtain the medication from home. The ruling may influence future legal disputes regarding abortion medications and serve as a reference for related policies in other states.

items.title: 16 More People in the U.S. Are Being Monitored for Hantavirus, C.D.C. Says
items.analysis_zh: 美国疾病控制与预防中心（C.D.C.）表示，因一名感染汉坦病毒的荷兰女性乘客去世，另有16名乘客正在接受监测。这一事件引发了公众对汉坦病毒传播的担忧，尤其是在航空旅行日益频繁的背景下。监测这些乘客的健康状况至关重要，以防止病毒进一步扩散，并确保公众安全。
items.analysis_en: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (C.D.C.) reported that 16 passengers are being monitored after a Dutch woman, who was infected with hantavirus, died. This incident raises public concern about the transmission of hantavirus, especially given the increasing frequency of air travel. Monitoring the health of these passengers is crucial to prevent further spread of the virus and to ensure public safety.

items.title: Hantavirus Doesn’t Spread Easily, but Officials May Be Downplaying Risks
items.analysis_zh: 汉坦病毒的传播性明显低于新冠病毒，科学家们对此达成共识。然而，研究表明在某些情况下，病毒可以在没有直接接触的情况下在人与人之间传播。这一发现引发了人们对公共卫生政策的关注，尤其是在疫情后期，公众对各种病毒的警惕性仍然很高。尽管汉坦病毒的传播风险较低，但相关部门可能需要重新评估其潜在威胁，以确保公众的健康安全。
items.analysis_en: Scientists agree that hantavirus is significantly less contagious than the coronavirus. However, they have identified instances where the virus has spread between people without direct contact. This finding raises concerns about public health policies, especially as the public remains vigilant about various viruses in the post-pandemic era. Although the risk of hantavirus transmission is low, health officials may need to reassess its potential threat to ensure the safety of the public.

items.title: Will Her Daughter Be Safe at Pali High as It Rebuilds From LA Wildfires?
items.analysis_zh: 洛杉矶的家庭面临着一个噩梦般的现实：在野火烟雾将有毒化学物质覆盖了家园、学校和办公室后，何时才能安全返回。这个问题不仅关乎学生的健康，还涉及到学校重建后的安全措施。随着重建工作的进行，家长们对孩子在学校的安全感到担忧，这可能会影响他们的心理健康和学习状态。
items.analysis_en: Families in Los Angeles are grappling with a nightmare: after wildfire smoke enveloped homes, schools, and offices with toxic chemicals, when is it safe to return? This issue is not only about the health of students but also concerns the safety measures implemented during the school's rebuilding process. As reconstruction efforts continue, parents are worried about their children's safety at school, which could impact their mental health and academic performance.

items.title: Scientists say a daily multivitamin may help slow aging
items.analysis_zh: 一项大型临床试验的研究表明，服用每日复合维生素可能有助于减缓生物老化。经过两年的观察，参与者的多项DNA基础“表观遗传时钟”显示出较慢的老化速度，相当于生物年龄减少约四个月。尤其是那些起初生物年龄高于实际年龄的人群，受益最为明显。这项发现提示，简单的补充剂可能在促进健康老化方面发挥重要作用。
items.analysis_en: A large clinical trial has shown that taking a daily multivitamin may help slow biological aging. After two years, participants taking multivitamins exhibited slower aging in several DNA-based "epigenetic clocks," which equates to about four months less biological aging. Those who started with a biological age older than their actual age appeared to benefit the most. This finding suggests that a simple supplement could play a significant role in promoting healthier aging.

items.title: How Worried Should We Be About Hantavirus?
items.analysis_zh: 近期，关于汉坦病毒的报道引起了公众的关注。尽管目前没有迹象表明汉坦病毒疫情会演变为大流行，但公众可能并未获得所有相关信息。这一情况的重要性在于，了解病毒的传播方式和潜在风险对于公众健康至关重要。如果信息不透明，可能会导致不必要的恐慌或忽视防护措施。
items.analysis_en: Recently, reports about hantavirus have raised public concern. While there is currently no indication that the hantavirus outbreak could escalate into a pandemic, the public may not be receiving all relevant information. This situation is significant because understanding how the virus spreads and its potential risks is crucial for public health. If information remains unclear, it could lead to unnecessary panic or a lack of necessary precautions.

items.title: Who are the Japanese? Huge DNA discovery rewrites history
items.analysis_zh: 科学家对日本数千人的基因组进行分析，发现了一个被忽视的第三个祖先群体，这一发现挑战了长期以来被接受的“双重起源”理论。这一新识别的祖先似乎与日本东北部的古代蝦夷人有关。研究人员还发现了与糖尿病、心脏病和癌症等疾病相关的尼安德特人和丹尼索瓦人的遗传DNA。这项研究不仅重塑了日本的基因历史，也可能影响我们对日本人群体多样性的理解。
items.analysis_en: Scientists analyzing the genomes of thousands of individuals across Japan have discovered evidence of a previously overlooked third ancestral group, challenging the long-accepted "dual origins" theory. This newly identified ancestry appears to be linked to the ancient Emishi people from northeastern Japan. Additionally, researchers uncovered inherited Neanderthal and Denisovan DNA associated with conditions such as diabetes, heart disease, and cancer. This study not only reshapes our understanding of Japan's genetic history but may also influence how we perceive the diversity within the Japanese population.

items.title: New psychedelic-like drugs could treat depression without making you trip
items.analysis_zh: 加州大学戴维斯分校的研究人员通过紫外光照射氨基酸分子，创造出了一种全新的类迷幻化合物。这些化合物能够激活与大脑可塑性和心理健康相关的关键血清素受体，然而在动物实验中却没有引发幻觉行为。这一发现具有重要意义，可能为抑郁症、创伤后应激障碍和成瘾等疾病提供新的治疗方法，而无需经历强烈的迷幻体验。
items.analysis_en: Researchers at the University of California, Davis, have developed a new class of psychedelic-like compounds by shining UV light on amino acid molecules. These compounds activate key serotonin receptors associated with brain plasticity and mental health benefits, yet surprisingly do not induce hallucination-like behaviors in animal tests. This discovery is significant as it could lead to new treatments for depression, PTSD, and addiction without the intense psychedelic experiences typically associated with such therapies.

心理/哲学.description: 心理学、行为、认知、哲学与意义讨论

items.title: Silvesterchlausen
items.analysis_zh: 瑞士的“Silvesterchlausen”是一项神秘的传统仪式，至今已有几个世纪的历史。尽管人们对其起源和意义仍然存在疑问，这项仪式依然吸引了众多游客和研究者的关注。它不仅是瑞士文化的重要组成部分，还反映了人们对历史和传统的珍视。这种仪式可能会影响当地的旅游业和文化传承，促进对传统习俗的重新审视。
items.analysis_en: The "Silvesterchlausen" is an enigmatic ritual in Switzerland that has existed for centuries. Despite uncertainties surrounding its origins and meaning, the tradition continues to draw the attention of tourists and researchers alike. This ritual is not only a vital part of Swiss culture but also reflects the community's appreciation for history and tradition. It may impact local tourism and cultural heritage, encouraging a renewed interest in traditional customs.

items.title: Rights require money
items.analysis_zh: 这篇文章探讨了人权与全球金融体系之间的关系。作者指出，尽管人们对人权的讨论层出不穷，但在没有对全球金融架构进行改革的情况下，这些讨论无法带来实质性的改变。这一观点的重要性在于，它强调了经济因素在实现人权方面的关键作用，可能促使政策制定者重新思考如何通过经济改革来推动人权的实现。
items.analysis_en: This article examines the relationship between human rights and the global financial system. The author argues that despite ongoing discussions about human rights, no substantial change can occur without reforming the architecture of global finance. This perspective is significant as it highlights the critical role of economic factors in achieving human rights, potentially prompting policymakers to reconsider how economic reforms can facilitate the realization of these rights.

items.title: New psychedelic-like drugs could treat depression without making you trip
items.analysis_zh: 加州大学戴维斯分校的研究人员通过紫外线照射氨基酸分子，创造了一类全新的类迷幻药物。这些化合物能够激活与大脑可塑性和心理健康相关的关键血清素受体，但在动物实验中却没有引起幻觉行为。这一发现可能为抑郁症、创伤后应激障碍和成瘾等疾病提供新的治疗方法，而无需经历强烈的迷幻体验。这项研究的成果为未来药物开发开辟了新的方向，可能带来更安全的治疗选择。
items.analysis_en: Researchers at the University of California, Davis, have developed a new class of psychedelic-like compounds by shining UV light on amino acid molecules. These compounds activate key serotonin receptors associated with brain plasticity and mental health benefits, yet surprisingly do not induce hallucinations in animal tests. This discovery could lead to new treatments for depression, PTSD, and addiction without the intense psychedelic experiences typically associated with such therapies. The findings open up new avenues for drug development, potentially offering safer treatment options in the future.

AI 科技.description: AI、芯片、软件、科技产业与研究进展

items.title: Closing time
items.analysis_zh: 今天是马斯克与奥特曼案件的结案辩论，现场的表现让人难以置信。马斯克的律师史蒂文·莫洛在发言时频频结结巴巴，甚至错误地称呼共同被告格雷格·布罗克曼为格雷格·奥特曼。他的辩护缺乏实质证据，反而被法官纠正了关于马斯克并不索要金钱的错误说法。这场庭审不仅关乎OpenAI的未来，更反映了马斯克与奥特曼之间的私人恩怨，可能对两位科技领袖的声誉和未来合作产生深远影响。
items.analysis_en: Today marked the closing arguments in the Musk v. Altman trial, and the proceedings were astonishing. Musk's lawyer, Steven Molo, struggled with his words and mistakenly referred to co-defendant Greg Brockman as Greg Altman. His defense lacked substantial evidence and was even corrected by the judge regarding Musk's claims of not asking for money. This trial is not only about the future of OpenAI but also highlights the personal grievances between Musk and Altman, which could have lasting implications for the reputations and future collaborations of these tech leaders.

items.title: What the jury must weigh to decide the case.
items.analysis_zh: 最近，陪审团正在审理一起涉及人工智能技术的案件。这一案件的重要性在于，它可能会影响未来AI技术的法律框架和责任归属。随着AI在各个领域的广泛应用，如何界定其法律地位和责任将成为一个关键问题。如果陪审团的裁决能够明确这些界限，将为行业的发展提供更清晰的指导。
items.analysis_en: Recently, a jury is deliberating a case involving artificial intelligence technology. This case is significant because it could impact the legal framework and accountability surrounding AI in the future. As AI becomes increasingly prevalent across various sectors, defining its legal status and responsibilities will be crucial. If the jury's decision can clarify these boundaries, it will provide clearer guidance for the industry's development.

items.title: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond got its first big discount
items.analysis_zh: 任天堂的《银河战士：原生4：超越》在Best Buy首次大幅降价，现价为39.99美元，优惠幅度为20美元。这款游戏在2017年的硬件上表现出色，但在Switch 2上运行效果更佳，玩家可以通过额外的10美元升级包解锁更高分辨率的纹理和更快的加载时间。此次降价对于希望体验这款视觉效果出色的第一人称射击游戏的玩家来说，提供了一个绝佳的机会，同时也可能吸引更多新玩家加入这个系列。
items.analysis_en: Nintendo's "Metroid Prime 4: Beyond" has received its first major discount at Best Buy, now priced at $39.99, which is $20 off. The game performs impressively on the 2017 hardware, but it runs even better on the Switch 2, where players can unlock higher-resolution textures and faster loading times with an additional $10 upgrade pack. This discount presents a great opportunity for players looking to experience this visually stunning first-person shooter, and it may also attract new players to the franchise.

items.title: Meta brings virtual writing to everyone with Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses
items.analysis_zh: Meta最近为其Ray-Ban Display智能眼镜推出了新功能，允许用户通过手势来撰写消息。这一功能适用于WhatsApp、Messenger、Instagram以及本地的Android和iOS消息应用。此项技术依赖于眼镜内置的神经腕带，虽然在首次发布时未能及时推出，但在1月份已为部分用户提供了早期访问。这项创新不仅提升了用户体验，还可能推动智能眼镜在日常沟通中的应用，进一步拓展了可穿戴设备的功能。
items.analysis_en: Meta has recently introduced new features for its Ray-Ban Display smart glasses, allowing users to write messages using hand gestures. This functionality will be available in WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, and native Android and iOS messaging apps. The technology relies on the glasses' built-in neural wristband, which was not available at launch but was made accessible to some users in early access in January. This innovation not only enhances user experience but may also drive the adoption of smart glasses in everyday communication, further expanding the capabilities of wearable devices.

items.title: Behold, the Elon Musk jackass trophy
items.analysis_zh: 在最近的穆斯克与奥特曼的法庭案件中，奥特曼的团队展示了一座看似小联盟奖杯的物品，实际上是为了纪念研究科学家乔什·阿基亚姆而购买的。这座奖杯上刻有“永远不要停止做个混蛋”的字样，反映了穆斯克与阿基亚姆之间的争执。此事件不仅揭示了穆斯克在离开OpenAI时的态度，还可能影响公众对他在人工智能安全问题上的立场的看法。
items.analysis_en: In the recent trial of Musk v. Altman, Altman's team presented what appeared to be a little league trophy, which was actually a commemorative gift for research scientist Josh Achiam. The trophy bore the inscription "Never stop being a jackass," highlighting a past conflict between Musk and Achiam. This incident not only reveals Musk's attitude when he left OpenAI but may also affect public perception of his stance on AI safety issues.

items.title: Leaked images reveal Xbox Elite 3 controller with mysterious new buttons
items.analysis_zh: 近日，巴西的监管机构Anatel意外发布了微软即将推出的Xbox Elite 3手柄的图片。这款手柄是Elite 2的继任者，配备了可更换的十字键、踏板和两个神秘的新按钮。这一消息引发了玩家的广泛关注，因为新手柄可能会带来更好的游戏体验和更多的自定义选项，尤其是在飞行模拟等游戏中。随着游戏设备的不断升级，Elite 3手柄的发布可能会对市场竞争产生重要影响。
items.analysis_en: Recently, Brazil's Anatel regulator accidentally published images of Microsoft's upcoming Xbox Elite 3 controller. This new controller is the successor to the Elite 2, featuring an interchangeable D-Pad, paddles, and two mysterious new buttons. This news has generated significant interest among gamers, as the new controller could enhance the gaming experience and offer more customization options, particularly for games like Microsoft Flight Simulator. With the continuous upgrades in gaming devices, the release of the Elite 3 may have a significant impact on market competition.

items.title: An Engineer’s Post Protesting Laptop Surveillance Is Going Viral Inside Meta
items.analysis_zh: Meta公司的员工在美国和英国发起了一场针对公司监控软件的抗议活动，该软件会追踪员工的键盘输入和鼠标活动。一位工程师的帖子引起了广泛关注，揭示了这种监控措施对员工隐私的潜在侵犯。这一事件不仅反映了员工对工作环境的担忧，也可能促使其他公司重新审视其监控政策，进而影响整个行业的劳动关系和员工权益。
items.analysis_en: Employees at Meta in the US and UK are organizing protests against corporate software that monitors their keystrokes and mouse movements. A post by an engineer has gone viral, highlighting the potential invasion of privacy that such surveillance represents. This incident not only reflects employees' concerns about their work environment but may also prompt other companies to reconsider their monitoring policies, potentially impacting labor relations and employee rights across the industry.

items.title: Cerebras, A.I. Chip Maker, Rises 89% in Market Debut as Tech IPOs Ramp Up
items.analysis_zh: Cerebras是一家位于硅谷的人工智能芯片制造商，最近在股市上首次亮相，股价上涨了89%。这一事件标志着科技公司首次公开募股（IPO）活动的加速，尤其是在SpaceX、OpenAI和Anthropic等知名企业也在准备上市的背景下。Cerebras的成功上市不仅显示了市场对人工智能技术的强烈兴趣，也可能为其他科技公司提供信心，推动更多企业走向公开市场。
items.analysis_en: Cerebras, a Silicon Valley maker of artificial intelligence chips, made its market debut recently, with its stock rising by 89%. This event signifies an acceleration in the initial public offering (IPO) activities among tech companies, especially as notable firms like SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic are also preparing to go public. The successful listing of Cerebras not only reflects strong market interest in AI technology but may also instill confidence in other tech companies, encouraging more firms to pursue public offerings.

items.title: OpenAI’s Codex is now in the ChatGPT mobile app
items.analysis_zh: OpenAI宣布，用户现在可以通过ChatGPT手机应用访问Codex，这是一款可以在电脑上编写代码和使用应用程序的桌面AI工具。这一举措是在Anthropic的Claude Code流行之后，OpenAI迅速采取的应对措施，旨在缩小与竞争对手的差距。Codex的移动应用版本使用户能够通过手机远程控制电脑上的任务，这可能会改变人们使用AI工具的方式，提升工作效率。
items.analysis_en: OpenAI has announced that users can now access Codex, its desktop AI tool for writing code and using applications, through the ChatGPT mobile app. This move comes in response to the rising popularity of Anthropic's Claude Code, prompting OpenAI to act quickly to close the gap with its competitors. The mobile version of Codex allows users to control tasks on their computer remotely via their phone, which could transform how people utilize AI tools and enhance productivity.

items.title: Here’s the latest.
items.analysis_zh: 最近，人工智能技术在各个领域的应用不断扩展，引发了广泛的关注和讨论。这一趋势不仅改变了企业的运营模式，还可能影响到就业市场和社会结构。随着AI技术的不断进步，相关的伦理和法律问题也日益凸显，亟需社会各界共同探讨解决方案。未来，如何平衡技术发展与人类福祉将成为一个重要议题。
items.analysis_en: Recently, the application of artificial intelligence technology has been expanding across various fields, sparking widespread attention and discussion. This trend is not only changing the operational models of businesses but may also impact the job market and social structures. As AI technology continues to advance, ethical and legal issues related to it are becoming increasingly prominent, necessitating collaborative discussions for solutions. In the future, balancing technological development with human welfare will be a crucial topic.

美学.description: 艺术、设计、摄影、建筑、审美与文化

items.title: Valie Export, Groundbreaking Feminist Artist Who Questioned the Nature of Art, Dies at 85
items.analysis_zh: 著名的女性主义艺术家瓦莉·艾克斯波特（Valie Export）于85岁去世。她的作品以女性身体为中心，挑战了艺术的本质和传统观念。艾克斯波特的去世不仅是艺术界的损失，也让人们重新思考女性在艺术创作中的角色和地位。她的影响力将继续激励新一代艺术家，推动对性别和身体的讨论。
items.analysis_en: Renowned feminist artist Valie Export has passed away at the age of 85. Her work centered on the female body and challenged traditional notions of art. Export's death is a significant loss for the art world and prompts a reevaluation of women's roles and status in artistic creation. Her influence will continue to inspire a new generation of artists and advance discussions on gender and the body.

items.title: sculptural ceramic tile chairs transform into storage objects for a new york apartment
items.analysis_zh: 最近，一种新型的陶瓷砖椅子在纽约公寓中被设计为储物对象。这一项目将家庭空间与文学中的重复和持久性理念相结合，展现了设计与实用性的完美融合。这种创新的设计不仅提升了空间的美感，还为小型公寓提供了更高效的存储解决方案，反映了现代生活对功能性和美学的双重追求。
items.analysis_en: Recently, a new type of ceramic tile chair has been designed to function as storage objects in a New York apartment. This project connects domestic space with literary ideas of repetition and permanence, showcasing a perfect blend of design and practicality. This innovative design not only enhances the aesthetic of the space but also offers a more efficient storage solution for small apartments, reflecting the modern lifestyle's dual pursuit of functionality and aesthetics.

items.title: Peter Doig, Tracey Emin, and More Sign Letter Defending Southbank Centre Chair
items.analysis_zh: 近日，彼得·多伊格和特雷西·艾敏等知名艺术家签署了一封信，支持南岸中心主席米桑·哈里曼，称其是“虚假抹黑运动”的受害者。这一事件引发了广泛关注，因为南岸中心在文化艺术界具有重要地位，哈里曼的领导能力备受认可。艺术界的支持可能会影响公众对这一事件的看法，并为哈里曼的未来发展提供保障。
items.analysis_en: Recently, prominent artists like Peter Doig and Tracey Emin signed a letter defending Misan Harriman, the chair of the Southbank Centre, claiming he is a victim of a "dishonest smear campaign." This incident has garnered significant attention, as the Southbank Centre holds an important position in the cultural and artistic community, and Harriman's leadership is well-regarded. The support from the art community may influence public perception of the situation and provide a safeguard for Harriman's future endeavors.

items.title: Frank Stack, Painter Who Secretly Drew ‘The Adventures of Jesus,’ Dies at 88
items.analysis_zh: 弗兰克·斯塔克（Frank Stack），这位以笔名“愚人鲟”（Foolbert Sturgeon）而闻名的画家，因其创作的《耶稣的冒险》而受到关注，近日去世，享年88岁。他在20年间以漫画形式描绘耶稣与现代伪善者的遭遇，探讨了信仰与社会的关系。这一作品不仅在艺术界产生了影响，也引发了人们对宗教与现代社会之间矛盾的思考。斯塔克的去世标志着一个时代的结束，他的作品将继续激励后人。
items.analysis_en: Frank Stack, known by his pen name Foolbert Sturgeon, has passed away at the age of 88. For two decades, he created the comic series "The Adventures of Jesus," where he depicted Christ's encounters with modern-day hypocrites, exploring the relationship between faith and society. His work has not only impacted the art world but also sparked discussions about the contradictions between religion and contemporary life. Stack's death marks the end of an era, and his legacy will continue to inspire future generations.

items.title: In Venice, the Passion of Life and the Ghost of Art
items.analysis_zh: 在2026年威尼斯艺术展上，展览将庆祝生命的活力，这一主题既有积极的一面，也有消极的影响。这一盛会作为世界上历史最悠久的艺术展览，吸引了全球艺术家的关注，展示了当代艺术的多样性与创造力。这样的展览不仅推动了艺术界的交流与合作，也可能引发对艺术本质和社会责任的深思。
items.analysis_en: The 2026 Venice Art Biennale will celebrate the vitality of life, highlighting both its positive and negative aspects. As the world's oldest art exhibition, it draws attention from artists worldwide, showcasing the diversity and creativity of contemporary art. Such an event not only fosters communication and collaboration within the art community but may also provoke reflections on the nature of art and its social responsibilities.

items.title: Clarence Carter, Singer of Lust-Filled Soul Hits, Dies at 90
items.analysis_zh: 克拉伦斯·卡特，这位以充满欲望的灵魂乐而闻名的歌手，近日去世，享年90岁。他的经典歌曲《Slip Away》和《Back Door Santa》展现了他如同乡村传教士般的热情和酒吧幽默。这位音乐家的离世不仅让乐迷感到惋惜，也意味着一个时代的结束。他的作品影响了无数后来的艺术家，继续在音乐界留下深远的印记。
items.analysis_en: Clarence Carter, the renowned singer known for his lust-filled soul hits, has passed away at the age of 90. His iconic songs, such as "Slip Away" and "Back Door Santa," showcased his fervor akin to that of a backwoods preacher, combined with the humor typical of juke joints. His death is a significant loss for fans and marks the end of an era in music. Carter's influence on countless artists will continue to resonate in the music industry for years to come.

items.title: Melbourne Design Week to highlight how powerful design can "shape the way we live"
items.analysis_zh: 墨尔本设计周将于5月14日至24日举行，庆祝其第十届活动。这一盛会由维多利亚国家美术馆主办，旨在展示设计创新如何影响澳大利亚及国际社会的现代生活。此次活动包括超过400个展览和讲座，强调设计在塑造人们生活方式中的重要性。通过这样的展示，设计不仅被视为艺术形式，也被认为是推动社会变革和提升生活质量的关键因素。
items.analysis_en: Melbourne Design Week will take place from May 14 to 24, celebrating its tenth edition. Organized by the National Gallery of Victoria, this event aims to showcase how design innovations impact contemporary life in Australia and beyond. With over 400 exhibitions and talks, it emphasizes the significance of design in shaping the way people live. Such an event highlights that design is not only an art form but also a crucial factor in driving social change and improving quality of life.

items.title: ‘to honor the little plants’ artist jasmin sian cuts intricate, overgrown worlds from deli bags
items.analysis_zh: 纽约艺术家贾斯敏·西安（Jasmin Sian）在惠特尼双年展上展出了她的最新作品，利用废弃的纸袋创作出精致的、如同蕾丝般的艺术品。这些作品不仅展现了她对自然的热爱，还呼应了对环境保护的关注。通过将日常物品转化为艺术，西安的作品提醒人们关注身边的小植物和自然环境的脆弱性。这种艺术形式可能会激发更多人关注可持续性和环保艺术的创作。
items.analysis_en: New York-based artist Jasmin Sian showcased her latest works at the Whitney Biennial, creating intricate, lace-like artworks from discarded paper bags. These pieces not only reflect her love for nature but also highlight the importance of environmental awareness. By transforming everyday items into art, Sian's work serves as a reminder of the fragility of small plants and our natural surroundings. This artistic approach may inspire more individuals to engage with sustainability and environmentally conscious art.

items.title: The Best Booths at 1-54 Contemporary African Art Fair, From Surrealist Fantasias to Afro-Brazilian Imaginings
items.analysis_zh: 第1-54届当代非洲艺术博览会在纽约重新开幕，特别聚焦于非洲巴西艺术。此次博览会汇聚了众多艺术家的作品，展示了超现实主义幻想与非洲巴西想象的结合。这一盛会不仅为艺术爱好者提供了丰富的视觉体验，也为非洲及其侨民的文化表达提供了重要平台。博览会的成功举办可能会进一步推动对非洲艺术的关注与认可，促进相关艺术市场的发展。
items.analysis_en: The 1-54 Contemporary African Art Fair has reopened in New York, with a special emphasis on Afro-Brazilian art. This event showcases a variety of artworks that blend surrealist fantasies with Afro-Brazilian imaginations. The fair not only offers a rich visual experience for art enthusiasts but also serves as an important platform for cultural expression from Africa and its diaspora. The successful hosting of this fair may further enhance the recognition and appreciation of African art, potentially boosting the growth of related art markets.

items.title: Frick Inks Three-Year Partnership with Louis Vuitton, with Support for Exhibitions and Free Fridays
items.analysis_zh: 弗里克收藏馆与路易威登达成为期三年的合作伙伴关系，首个活动将是展示路易威登2027年度假系列。这一合作不仅将为弗里克带来新的展览支持，还将推出“免费星期五”活动，吸引更多观众前来参观。此举对于提升弗里克的知名度和吸引力至关重要，同时也可能促进艺术与奢侈品牌之间的进一步合作。
items.analysis_en: The Frick Collection has established a three-year partnership with Louis Vuitton, which will kick off with the presentation of Louis Vuitton's Cruise 2027 collection. This collaboration will not only provide support for new exhibitions at the Frick but will also introduce "Free Fridays" to attract more visitors. This initiative is crucial for enhancing the Frick's visibility and appeal, and it may also foster further collaborations between the art world and luxury brands.
